# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
- name: vmNamePrefix
  type: string
  default: 'dev'
  
resources:
- name: sgRuleRDP
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: rdpRule
        protocol: tcp
        sourceAddressPrefixes:
          - '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationPortRange: 3389
        access: Allow
-name: sgRuleSSH
  type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01  
  properties:   
     securityRules:      - name: sshRule       protocol: tcp sourceAddressPrefixes: ['0.0.0.0/0'] destinationPortRange: 22 access: Allow        
-name : sgRuleHTTP          type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01   properties:     securityRules:[ name: httpRule protocol: tcp sourceAddressPrefixes: ['0.0.0.0/0'] destinationPortRange: 80 access: Allow        
-name : sgRuleHTTPS          type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups@2019-07-01   properties:     securityRules:[ name: httpsRule protocol: tcp sourceAddressPrefixes: ['0.0.0.0/0'] destinationPortRange: 443 access: Allow
